from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, workspaces_holdout_1_store

PATH = '/workspaces-h1'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    workspaces_holdout_1_store.clear()

def test_invalid_state_error_behavior():
    created = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'holdout-workspaces-alpha-1'}).json()
    client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'archived'})
    assert client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'active'}).status_code == 409

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, contracts_holdout_1_store

PATH = '/contracts-h1'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    contracts_holdout_1_store.clear()

def test_optional_field_handling():
    missing = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'holdout-contracts-alpha-1'}).json()
    explicit = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'holdout-contracts-beta-1', 'note': None}).json()
    supplied = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'holdout-contracts-gamma-1', 'note': 'ok'}).json()
    assert [missing['note'], explicit['note'], supplied['note']] == [None, None, 'ok']

    client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'archived'})
    assert client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'active'}).status_code == 409
